title: Waita Tar dance
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
The '''Waita Tar dance''' was a celebratory ritual dance performed by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookees]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]]. The dance involved torches, yodeling and the [[Gender/Legends|females]] moving in a circle around the [[Gender/Legends|males]].

After [[Annikin Starkiller]] impressed the Wookees with his martial prowess, he was welcomed that night by a Waita Tar dance.

==Behind the scenes==
The Wookees were renamed "[[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]]" in the first draft revision, though this was later reversed. The notion of a celebratory dance and fire ceremony was written into [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|Episode VI]], with the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]].
